Team.title: Team management
Team.subtitle: Send invites, manage roles, and control access. Actions are protected by the management.users permission.
Team.toastInviteOk: Invitation sent. Registration completes via the email link.

RoleArchitect.tenantDenySub: Permissions enabled globally can be turned off for this tenant (except super_admin).

seoGeo.coldImpressionsCaption: Search impressions appear here after Google Search Console sync.
seoGeo.coldVisitsCaption: Page and query traffic fills automatically once connected.
seoGeo.coldCtrCaption: Click-through rate shaped by content and snippet engineering.

seoGeo.geoSubtitleFallback: Simulated visibility from DeepSeek GEO engine · refresh via cron or pipeline
seoGeo.geoInactiveBody: GEO intelligence activates after Search Console sync and DeepSeek report generation (cron or manual).
seoGeo.serviceVisibilitySub: GEO · AI citations vs tracked keywords
seoGeo.cwvEmptyBody: When technical SEO logs or PageSpeed simulation arrive, LCP, FID, and CLS rings come alive here. Engineering may be preparing the snapshot while data is pending.

geoKeyword.emptyBody: Run Google OAuth with Search Console, then trigger the GEO simulator (cron or pipeline) to populate DeepSeek visibility scores and action plans per query.
geoKeyword.tableSubtitle: DeepSeek · simulated LLM visibility vs GSC context

geoRank.emptySub: Keyword tracking across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google, and Bing will appear here
geoRank.tableSub: GEO engines + Google Search Console (last sync)

cwv.title: Core Web Vitals

spendChart.title: Ad spend trend
spendChart.emptyHint: The spend curve renders after ad accounts connect and daily sync completes.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected ad accounts · SSOT
connectedAccounts.disconnectDescription: No active ad account found. Refresh OAuth for Meta, Google, or TikTok to start data flow.

dataDisconnected.defaultDescription: Ad account connection could not be refreshed or data has not arrived yet. Reconnect to restart the stream.
